name: Baked Avocado with Curried Nut/Raisin Stuffin
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons Vegetable broth OR 4 tablespoons Olive oil, extra virgin
6 large Avocados, ripe, skinned and destoned -- and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté the onions in the broth or oil over medium-high heat for 5 minutes.
2. Add the remaining ingredients, except the avocados and cheesy sauce, and stir well until warm.
3. Transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish and place the avocados on top.
4. Top with the cheesy sauce.
5. Serve with tomato salsa.
6. Bake in an oven set to 325 degrees for 20 minutes.
